<div align="center">
  <h1>Contribution Guidelines for AI<h1>
</div>
    
**We accept contributions from all sources, no contribution is too small.**  

### 🏗️ Code Quality & Style
- **Readability:** Do not have a complete unreadable code Beyond. 
-  **Naming Conventions:** Check your spelling and grammar when it comes to  `functions` or  `def` and  variable names. 
- **Documentation:** keep your code as well documented and cite it for future people.
